---
name: Workflow request
about: Suggest a new Amazon PM workflow, gate, decision rule, or output template
title: "Workflow: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What product-management decision or workflow problem should this solve?

## Scenario

Which scenario does this affect?

- [ ] Market screening
- [ ] Product selection
- [ ] Competitor analysis
- [ ] VOC and product definition
- [ ] ROI or FBA economics
- [ ] Launch planning
- [ ] PPC or growth diagnosis
- [ ] Inventory or stop-loss decision
- [ ] Executive reporting

## Proposed behavior

Describe the expected skill behavior or output.

## Evidence or example

Share a public, anonymized example if useful.

## Privacy check

- [ ] This request does not include private seller data, raw ASIN exports, screenshots, credentials, supplier quotes, paid-tool exports, or customer records.
